technologies.name: Symphony Java client SDK
technologies.description: The Symphony java client provides a real-time wrapper around the Symphony REST API's to simplify the creation of chat sessions, room access, presence, messaging and more... The client provides a set of logical services representing supported features of the Symphony platform. Services support real-time events through feature based listeners and communication objects. Access is not limited to the services as all underlying Symphony client implementations are exposed for advanced use or creation of your own service.

technologies.name: FluentAssertions
technologies.description:
A very extensive set of extension methods that allow you to more naturally specify the expected outcome of a TDD or
     BDD-style unit tests. Works with .NET Standard 2.0 and higher, .NET Framework 4.7 and higher and .NET 6 and higher.
     Supports the unit test frameworks MSTest2, NUnit3, NUnit4, XUnit2, XUnit3, MSpec and TUnit.

technologies.name: xUnit.net
technologies.description: xUnit.net is a free, open source, community-focused unit testing tool for the .NET Framework. Written by the original inventor of NUnit v2, xUnit.net is the latest technology for unit testing C#, F#, VB.NET and other .NET languages. xUnit.net works with command line tools, Visual Studio, Visual Studio Code, ReSharper/Rider, CodeRush, and NCrunch. It is part of the .NET Foundation, and operates under their code of conduct.
